professional_summary: Third-year Computer Science student and Full Stack Web Developer with hands-on experience in the MERN stack and AI/ML integrations. Passionate about building scalable web applications and automating workflows to reduce human error. Proven ability to deliver end-to-end projects, from cloud-hosted collegiate platforms to AI-powered threat prediction models, with a strong focus on clean code and reliable system performance.

responsibilities: Built an AI-based cyber threat prediction system using Python and FastAPI to detect and block server vulnerabilities in real-time, reducing response times by 30%.
Trained a reinforcement learning model with over 98% accuracy, designed to continuously learn and adapt to new attack patterns.
Developed a responsive frontend dashboard with interactive charts for monitoring network health and server status.
Connected multiple servers and optimized data processing pipelines to significantly reduce system latency.

projects.title: Code Sprint Platform
description: Established an online competitive programming platform featuring a sandboxed automated code judge to securely execute code across multiple language runtimes.
Self-hosted and configured the Judge0 execution engine within a localized WSL environment, utilizing Cloudflare Tunnels to securely expose endpoints without open ports.
Formulated a real-time, socket-driven leaderboard tracking metrics for 100+ concurrent users, processing simultaneous submissions with evaluation latency under 200 ms.
Deployed a centralized contest coordinator dashboard enabling early finisher detection to dynamically designate event winners based on completion speed.

projects.title: MailOps — AI-Powered Email Operations Dashboard
description: Constructed an active email triaging engine parsing incoming messages via webhooks, processing classification tasks in under 500 ms via concurrent LLM orchestration.
Styled a clean 10|30|60 interface to isolate core workspace layout modules, containing dynamic context elements that handle up to 1,200 emails daily without data drag.
Executed a fast Kanban module backed by asynchronous database polling on Supabase PostgreSQL, preventing data drift across multi-user ticket status changes.
